title: Effects of Phasing Out of MFA Quotas on Indian Garment Exports, 1992–2003

summary.about: Whether removing Multi Fibre Arrangement quotas helped Indian garment exports.
summary.audience: Textile exporters, trade officials and applied-economics researchers.
summary.method: Tests monthly data using structural-break, split-sample and intervention-analysis methods.
summary.insights: Quota phase-out produced a positive, statistically significant and long-lasting improvement in Indian garment exports.
